roles.title: Software Engineer (Fresher)
roles.description: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) is seeking fresh graduates for the role of Software Engineer. Candidates should hold a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related engineering disciplines with a minimum of 60% aggregate or 6.0 CGPA. The role involves working on enterprise-scale software solutions for global clients across industries including banking, healthcare, retail, and manufacturing. Key technical skills required include proficiency in at least one programming language such as Java, Python, C++, or C#, understanding of object-oriented programming principles, familiarity with databases and SQL, basic knowledge of web technologies like HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC) methodologies including Agile and Waterfall. Candidates should have strong analytical and problem-solving abilities, excellent verbal and written communication skills, and willingness to work in a team-oriented collaborative environment. TCS values adaptability, continuous learning mindset, and the ability to work on diverse technology stacks. Experience with version control systems like Git, basic understanding of cloud computing concepts (AWS, Azure), and familiarity with REST APIs are considered advantageous. The role offers opportunities to work on cutting-edge technologies including AI/ML, blockchain, IoT, and cloud-native architectures. TCS provides extensive training through its Initial Learning Program (ILP) for freshers, covering technical and soft skills needed for project readiness.

roles.title: Software Engineer (Fresher)
roles.description: Infosys is hiring fresh engineering graduates as Software Engineers through its campus recruitment program. Candidates must have a degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics, or related fields with a minimum of 65% aggregate marks or equivalent CGPA. The position requires strong foundational knowledge in data structures and algorithms, proficiency in at least one programming language such as Java, Python, or C++, understanding of database management systems and SQL queries, basic knowledge of operating systems and computer networks, and familiarity with software engineering principles. Infosys values candidates who demonstrate strong logical reasoning, analytical thinking, and effective communication skills. Knowledge of modern web development frameworks such as React, Angular, or Spring Boot is beneficial. Understanding of cloud platforms like AWS or Azure, DevOps practices, and containerization technologies like Docker adds value. The role involves working on digital transformation projects for global enterprises spanning multiple domains including financial services, telecommunications, energy, and healthcare. Infosys provides comprehensive training at its Mysore campus covering programming, project management, and domain-specific knowledge. Candidates should be open to relocation, comfortable with shift-based work schedules, and willing to travel for client engagements. Strong interpersonal skills and ability to collaborate in globally distributed teams are essential.

roles.title: Software Engineer (Fresher)
roles.description: Wipro Technologies invites applications from fresh graduates for the Software Engineer position through its Elite National Talent Hunt program. Eligible candidates must have a Bachelor's degree in engineering with specialization in Computer Science, IT, ECE, or EEE with a minimum aggregate of 60% throughout academics. The role demands foundational programming skills in Java, Python, C, or C++, understanding of object-oriented programming and design patterns, knowledge of relational databases, SQL, and basic data modeling, familiarity with web technologies including HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and RESTful services, and understanding of software testing methodologies and quality assurance principles. Wipro emphasizes candidates with strong aptitude skills covering quantitative reasoning, logical ability, and verbal proficiency. Knowledge of emerging technologies such as artificial intelligence, machine learning, robotic process automation (RPA), cybersecurity, and cloud computing is advantageous. The role involves contributing to software development, maintenance, and support activities for international clients across industries including banking and financial services, healthcare, consumer goods, and energy. Wipro offers a structured training program covering technical skills, domain knowledge, and professional development. Candidates should possess strong teamwork abilities, cultural adaptability, and a customer-focused mindset. Willingness to work in an agile environment and handle multiple priorities simultaneously is expected.

roles.title: Software Engineer
roles.description: Google is looking for Software Engineers who can design, develop, test, deploy, maintain, and improve software systems at scale. Candidates should have a Bachelor's degree or higher in Computer Science or a related technical field, with exceptional programming skills in one or more languages including Python, Java, C++, Go, or JavaScript/TypeScript. Strong computer science fundamentals are essential: data structures (trees, graphs, hash maps, heaps), algorithms (sorting, searching, dynamic programming, graph algorithms), system design, and complexity analysis. Experience with distributed systems, large-scale data processing, and cloud infrastructure is highly valued. Familiarity with Google Cloud Platform or similar cloud services, MapReduce, protocol buffers, and microservices architectures is beneficial. Google values candidates who demonstrate intellectual curiosity, strong problem-solving skills, collaborative abilities, and a track record of shipping high-quality software. Experience with machine learning frameworks like TensorFlow or PyTorch, understanding of networking protocols, and knowledge of security best practices are additional strengths. The role involves working on products and services used by billions of users worldwide, contributing to open-source projects, and solving technically challenging problems. Google's engineering culture emphasizes code quality, peer reviews, design documents, and testing. Strong communication skills, ability to mentor others, and entrepreneurial drive are important qualities. Candidates should be comfortable with ambiguity and capable of independently driving projects from concept to launch in a fast-paced environment.

roles.title: Software Development Engineer
roles.description: Amazon is hiring Software Development Engineers (SDEs) to build and maintain scalable, high-performance systems that power the world's largest e-commerce and cloud computing platforms. Candidates must possess a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent technical discipline. Required skills include expertise in one or more programming languages such as Java, Python, C++, Ruby, or Go, deep understanding of data structures and algorithms, proficiency in system design and object-oriented design principles, experience with relational and NoSQL databases, and knowledge of distributed computing concepts. Amazon follows its Leadership Principles rigorously throughout the hiring process, valuing qualities like Customer Obsession, Ownership, Invent and Simplify, and Bias for Action. Technical proficiency in AWS services including EC2, S3, Lambda, DynamoDB, SQS, and SNS is highly advantageous. Experience with CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and DevOps practices is valued. The role requires building services that handle millions of transactions per second with high availability and fault tolerance. Candidates should have strong debugging and optimization skills, experience with agile methodologies, and ability to write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code. Understanding of networking, security, and performance tuning is important. Amazon values engineers who can think big, deliver results, and raise the bar in terms of engineering excellence. The work environment is fast-paced with high expectations for ownership and impact.

roles.title: Software Engineer
roles.description: Microsoft seeks Software Engineers to design and build world-class technology solutions across its product portfolio including Azure, Microsoft 365, Windows, Xbox, LinkedIn, and GitHub. Candidates should have a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or related field with strong programming skills in C#, C++, Java, Python, or TypeScript. Deep understanding of computer science fundamentals including data structures, algorithms, operating systems, and computer architecture is required. Experience with cloud computing platforms especially Microsoft Azure, understanding of distributed systems and microservices, and knowledge of software design patterns are highly valued. Microsoft looks for candidates who demonstrate growth mindset, collaborative problem-solving, and passion for technology that empowers every person and organization. Proficiency with version control (Git), continuous integration and deployment, test-driven development, and code review practices is essential. Knowledge of machine learning and AI technologies, particularly in the context of products like Copilot, is increasingly valuable. The role involves working across the full software development lifecycle from requirements gathering and architecture design to implementation, testing, deployment, and monitoring. Experience with large-scale systems serving millions of users, performance optimization, and accessibility considerations is beneficial. Microsoft values diverse perspectives, inclusive culture, and work-life balance. Strong communication skills, ability to influence without authority, and experience mentoring junior engineers are important for career growth.

roles.title: Data Analyst
roles.description: Data Analysts are responsible for interpreting data, analyzing results, and providing actionable insights using statistical techniques and visualization tools. Candidates should hold a Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field. Essential technical skills include proficiency in SQL for querying databases, expertise in Microsoft Excel including advanced functions, pivot tables, and macros, experience with data visualization tools such as Tableau, Power BI, or Google Data Studio, and programming skills in Python or R for statistical analysis. Knowledge of statistical concepts including hypothesis testing, regression analysis, A/B testing, and probability distributions is required. Familiarity with data warehousing concepts, ETL processes, and data pipeline architecture is valuable. Candidates must demonstrate strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and ability to communicate complex findings to non-technical stakeholders through clear reports, dashboards, and presentations. Experience with data cleaning, data wrangling, and handling missing or inconsistent data is essential. Knowledge of business intelligence tools, CRM systems, and understanding of key business metrics and KPIs across domains like e-commerce, finance, marketing, or operations adds significant value. The role requires intellectual curiosity, ability to identify trends and patterns in large datasets, and translating data insights into strategic recommendations. Experience with cloud data platforms like BigQuery, Redshift, or Snowflake and version control systems is increasingly important for modern data analyst roles.

roles.title: Data Scientist
roles.description: Data Scientists leverage advanced analytical techniques, machine learning, and statistical modeling to extract insights from complex datasets and drive data-informed decision-making. Candidates should possess a Master's or PhD degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related quantitative field. Core technical requirements include expertise in Python with libraries such as NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch, proficiency in R for statistical computing, advanced SQL skills for data extraction and manipulation, and experience with big data technologies like Spark, Hadoop, or Databricks. Strong mathematical foundation in linear algebra, calculus, probability theory, and optimization is essential. Experience with machine learning algorithms including supervised learning (regression, classification, ensemble methods), unsupervised learning (clustering, dimensionality reduction), deep learning (CNNs, RNNs, transformers), and natural language processing is required. Knowledge of experiment design, causal inference, and A/B testing methodologies is highly valued. Candidates should demonstrate experience with the full machine learning lifecycle: problem formulation, data collection and preprocessing, feature engineering, model training and evaluation, hyperparameter tuning, model deployment and monitoring. Familiarity with MLOps practices, model serving infrastructure, and cloud ML services (SageMaker, Vertex AI, Azure ML) is advantageous. Strong communication and storytelling skills to present findings to diverse audiences, experience with version control, and ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams including product managers and engineers are essential.

roles.title: Full Stack Developer
roles.description: Full Stack Developers design, develop, and maintain both client-side and server-side components of web applications. Candidates should hold a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field with 0-3 years of relevant experience. Frontend skills required include proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript (ES6+), experience with frontend frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue.js, knowledge of responsive design principles and CSS preprocessors (SASS/LESS), understanding of state management solutions like Redux or Vuex, and familiarity with build tools like Webpack, Vite, or Parcel. Backend skills required include expertise in server-side languages and frameworks such as Node.js with Express, Python with Django or Flask, Java with Spring Boot, or Ruby on Rails, experience with RESTful API design and implementation, knowledge of GraphQL, WebSocket protocols, and authentication mechanisms (JWT, OAuth2). Database skills should span both relational (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis) databases, including schema design, query optimization, and ORM usage. DevOps knowledge including Git version control, CI/CD pipelines, containerization with Docker, basic Kubernetes orchestration, and cloud deployment on AWS, Azure, or GCP is important. Understanding of web security practices including OWASP top 10, CORS, XSS prevention, and CSRF protection is essential. Testing experience with unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing frameworks is expected. Candidates must demonstrate strong problem-solving abilities, capacity to learn new technologies quickly, and ability to work effectively in agile teams.

roles.title: Backend Developer
roles.description: Backend Developers are responsible for building and maintaining the server-side logic, database interactions, and API layers that power applications. Candidates should have a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent with strong programming expertise in one or more server-side languages such as Java, Python, Node.js, Go, Rust, or C#. Deep understanding of web server architectures, API design patterns (REST, GraphQL, gRPC), and middleware concepts is essential. Database expertise should cover relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle) with advanced SQL skills, NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Cassandra, Redis, Elasticsearch), database performance tuning, indexing strategies, and migration management. Knowledge of message queuing systems like RabbitMQ, Apache Kafka, or AWS SQS for asynchronous processing and event-driven architectures is highly valued. Experience with microservices architecture, service mesh, API gateway patterns, and distributed system design including concepts like CAP theorem, eventual consistency, and circuit breakers is important. Proficiency in authentication and authorization mechanisms (OAuth2, JWT, SAML), API security best practices, and rate limiting. Experience with caching strategies using Redis or Memcached, load balancing, and horizontal scaling. Knowledge of containerization with Docker, orchestration with Kubernetes, infrastructure as code with Terraform or CloudFormation, and cloud services (AWS, GCP, Azure) is expected. Understanding of monitoring, logging, and observability tools like Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack, and distributed tracing. Strong code quality practices including code reviews, testing (unit, integration, contract), and documentation are essential.

roles.title: Frontend Developer
roles.description: Frontend Developers create engaging, performant, and accessible user interfaces for web applications. Candidates should possess a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Design, or related field with expertise in HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript (ES6+) and TypeScript. Proficiency in at least one major frontend framework — React (with hooks and context), Angular (with RxJS), or Vue.js (with Composition API) — is required. Strong understanding of responsive web design, mobile-first development, CSS Grid, Flexbox, and CSS-in-JS solutions or CSS Modules. Experience with state management libraries such as Redux, Zustand, MobX, NgRx, or Pinia. Knowledge of frontend build tooling including Webpack, Vite, Rollup, and package managers (npm, yarn, pnpm). Understanding of web performance optimization: code splitting, lazy loading, tree shaking, image optimization, and Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS). Experience with testing frameworks including Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress, or Playwright for unit, integration, and end-to-end testing. Knowledge of web accessibility standards (WCAG 2.1), semantic HTML, ARIA attributes, and inclusive design principles. Familiarity with design systems and component libraries, UI/UX principles, and collaboration with designers using tools like Figma or Sketch. Understanding of browser APIs, service workers, Progressive Web Apps (PWA), and WebSocket communication. Experience with RESTful API consumption, GraphQL clients like Apollo, and handling asynchronous data flows. Knowledge of SEO best practices, server-side rendering (Next.js, Nuxt.js), and static site generation. Version control with Git, code review practices, and agile development methodologies are essential.

roles.title: React Developer
roles.description: React Developers specialize in building modern, component-based user interfaces using Meta's React library and its ecosystem. Candidates should have a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent with deep expertise in React 18+, including functional components, hooks (useState, useEffect, useContext, useMemo, useCallback, useRef), and the component lifecycle. Strong proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+) and TypeScript is required, along with thorough understanding of JSX, virtual DOM reconciliation, and React's rendering behavior. Experience with state management solutions including React Context API, Redux Toolkit, Zustand, Recoil, or Jotai for complex application state. Proficiency in React Router for client-side navigation, code splitting with React.lazy and Suspense, and error boundaries for graceful error handling. Knowledge of Next.js or Remix for server-side rendering and full-stack React applications. Experience with data fetching patterns using React Query (TanStack Query), SWR, or Apollo Client for GraphQL. Strong CSS skills for component styling using CSS Modules, Styled Components, Emotion, or Tailwind CSS. Testing expertise with Jest, React Testing Library, and end-to-end testing with Cypress or Playwright. Understanding of React performance optimization techniques: memoization, virtualization for large lists, bundle analysis, and profiling with React DevTools. Familiarity with form handling libraries like React Hook Form or Formik, animation libraries like Framer Motion, and drag-and-drop libraries. Knowledge of design patterns in React including compound components, render props, higher-order components, custom hooks, and container/presentational patterns. Experience with CI/CD, Git workflows, and agile practices.

roles.title: Python Developer
roles.description: Python Developers build applications, automation scripts, data pipelines, and backend services using Python and its rich ecosystem. Candidates should hold a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field with expert-level Python programming skills covering advanced concepts like decorators, generators, context managers, metaclasses, asyncio, and type hints. Experience with Python web frameworks such as Django (with Django REST Framework), Flask, FastAPI, or Tornado for building RESTful APIs and web applications. Strong understanding of Python's standard library, package management with pip and virtual environments (venv, Poetry, Conda), and adhering to PEP 8 coding standards. Database integration experience with SQLAlchemy, Django ORM, or Tortoise ORM for relational databases, and PyMongo or motor for MongoDB. Knowledge of Python data processing libraries including Pandas, NumPy, and SciPy for data manipulation and scientific computing. Experience with task queues and background processing using Celery with Redis or RabbitMQ. Understanding of Python testing frameworks including pytest, unittest, and mock, with emphasis on test-driven development and code coverage. Proficiency with containerization (Docker), CI/CD pipelines, and cloud deployment. Knowledge of Python security best practices, input validation, and secure coding patterns. Experience with logging, monitoring, and debugging Python applications in production environments. Understanding of concurrency and parallelism in Python using threading, multiprocessing, and async/await patterns. Familiarity with Python packaging and distribution, documentation with Sphinx, and contributing to open-source projects. Version control with Git and collaborative development practices are essential.

roles.title: Java Developer
roles.description: Java Developers design and build enterprise-grade applications using Java and its extensive ecosystem. Candidates should possess a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent with strong proficiency in Java 11+ including features like lambdas, streams, Optional, modules, records, sealed classes, and pattern matching. Deep understanding of object-oriented programming principles, SOLID design principles, and Gang of Four design patterns. Expertise in Spring Framework ecosystem including Spring Boot for rapid application development, Spring MVC for web applications, Spring Data JPA for database access, Spring Security for authentication and authorization, and Spring Cloud for microservices. Experience with build tools like Maven or Gradle, and dependency management. Strong database skills with JDBC, Hibernate ORM, JPA, and experience with both relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle) and NoSQL stores (MongoDB, Redis, Cassandra). Knowledge of messaging systems like Apache Kafka, RabbitMQ, or ActiveMQ for event-driven architectures. Experience with RESTful API design, OpenAPI/Swagger documentation, and microservices communication patterns. Proficiency in testing with JUnit 5, Mockito, Spring Test, and integration testing strategies. Understanding of Java memory management, garbage collection tuning, JVM performance optimization, and profiling tools. Knowledge of containerization with Docker, orchestration with Kubernetes, and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP). Experience with CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or GitLab CI. Understanding of concurrent programming with Java's concurrency utilities, CompletableFuture, and reactive programming with Project Reactor or RxJava. Code quality practices including SonarQube, code reviews, and documentation are essential.

roles.title: DevOps Engineer
roles.description: DevOps Engineers bridge the gap between software development and IT operations, automating and optimizing the software delivery pipeline. Candidates should have a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field with strong experience in CI/CD pipeline design and implementation using tools like Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, Azure DevOps, or CircleCI. Expert knowledge of containerization technologies including Docker (Dockerfile optimization, multi-stage builds, container security) and container orchestration with Kubernetes (deployments, services, ingress, helm charts, operators, custom resources). Proficiency in infrastructure as code using Terraform, Pulumi, AWS CloudFormation, or Ansible for provisioning and managing cloud resources. Strong scripting skills in Bash, Python, or Go for automation tasks. Deep knowledge of cloud platforms — primarily AWS (EC2, ECS, EKS, Lambda, S3, RDS, CloudFront, Route53, IAM, VPC), with Azure or GCP experience being valuable. Understanding of networking concepts including DNS, load balancing, reverse proxies (Nginx, HAProxy), SSL/TLS, and VPN configuration. Experience with monitoring and observability stack: Prometheus for metrics collection, Grafana for visualization, ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) or Loki for log management, Jaeger or Zipkin for distributed tracing, and PagerDuty or OpsGenie for incident management. Knowledge of security best practices including secrets management (HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager), vulnerability scanning, container image scanning, and compliance automation. Experience with GitOps practices using tools like ArgoCD or Flux, and service mesh technologies like Istio or Linkerd. Strong collaboration and communication skills for working across development, QA, and operations teams.

roles.title: Machine Learning Engineer
roles.description: Machine Learning Engineers design, build, deploy, and maintain machine learning systems in production environments. Candidates should have a Master's degree or higher in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Statistics, or related quantitative field with strong programming expertise in Python and experience with ML frameworks including TensorFlow, PyTorch, JAX, or Keras. Deep understanding of machine learning algorithms spanning supervised learning (linear/logistic regression, decision trees, random forests, gradient boosting, SVMs, neural networks), unsupervised learning (k-means, DBSCAN, PCA, autoencoders), and reinforcement learning. Expertise in deep learning architectures including CNNs for computer vision, RNNs/LSTMs for sequence modeling, transformer architectures for NLP, GANs for generative tasks, and attention mechanisms. Experience with natural language processing including text preprocessing, word embeddings (Word2Vec, GloVe, BERT), sequence-to-sequence models, and large language model fine-tuning. Knowledge of computer vision tasks including image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation, and image generation. Strong mathematical foundation in linear algebra, multivariate calculus, probability and statistics, and optimization theory. Experience with MLOps practices: model versioning (MLflow, DVC), experiment tracking, automated training pipelines, model serving (TF Serving, TorchServe, Triton), A/B testing for models, and model monitoring for concept drift and data drift. Proficiency with data engineering concepts including ETL pipelines, feature stores, and data quality monitoring. Cloud ML platform experience with AWS SageMaker, Google Vertex AI, or Azure ML. Knowledge of model optimization techniques: quantization, pruning, knowledge distillation, and ONNX for cross-platform deployment. Strong software engineering skills including version control, testing, documentation, and code review practices.

roles.title: Business Analyst
roles.description: Business Analysts serve as the critical bridge between business stakeholders and technology teams, translating business needs into functional and technical requirements. Candidates should hold a Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Information Technology, Computer Science, or related field. Core competencies include requirements gathering and documentation using techniques such as stakeholder interviews, workshops, surveys, and observation. Proficiency in creating detailed business requirement documents (BRDs), functional requirement specifications (FRS), and user stories with acceptance criteria in Agile environments. Experience with business process modeling using BPMN notation, creating process flow diagrams, swimlane diagrams, and use case diagrams using tools like Visio, Lucidchart, or draw.io. Strong analytical skills for gap analysis, root cause analysis, SWOT analysis, and cost-benefit analysis. Knowledge of project management methodologies including Agile (Scrum, Kanban), Waterfall, and hybrid approaches. Proficiency in data analysis tools including Microsoft Excel (advanced), SQL for database querying, and visualization tools like Tableau or Power BI for creating executive dashboards. Experience with project management and collaboration tools such as JIRA, Confluence, Trello, and Microsoft Project. Understanding of software development lifecycle, testing methodologies, and change management processes. Domain knowledge in one or more industries such as banking for financial services, healthcare, e-commerce, insurance, or telecommunications. Strong communication skills including presentation abilities, stakeholder management, negotiation, and facilitation. Experience with wireframing and prototyping tools like Figma, Balsamiq, or Axure for communicating user interface requirements. Knowledge of enterprise systems like ERP, CRM, and understanding of integration patterns and API concepts.

roles.title: Product Manager
roles.description: Product Managers own the product vision, strategy, and roadmap, working at the intersection of business, technology, and user experience. Candidates should have a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Business, or related field, with MBA being advantageous. Core responsibilities include defining product vision and strategy aligned with business objectives, creating and prioritizing product roadmaps, and making data-driven decisions about feature development and resource allocation. Experience with product discovery techniques: user research, customer interviews, personas development, journey mapping, competitive analysis, and market sizing. Proficiency in agile product management: writing user stories and epics, managing product backlogs, sprint planning, defining acceptance criteria, and working with cross-functional development teams. Strong understanding of product metrics and analytics: defining and tracking KPIs (DAU, MAU, retention, conversion, NPS, LTV, CAC), setting up analytics with tools like Google Analytics, Mixpanel, Amplitude, or Heap, and conducting A/B testing and experiment design. Technical literacy sufficient to communicate effectively with engineering teams including understanding of system architecture, APIs, databases, cloud infrastructure, and development processes. Experience with product management tools: Jira, Asana, Productboard, Aha, Miro, and Figma. Understanding of go-to-market strategy, pricing models, and user acquisition channels. Knowledge of design thinking and lean startup methodologies for rapid experimentation and iteration. Strong stakeholder management skills including presenting to executives, managing competing priorities, and building consensus. Experience with platform products, marketplace dynamics, growth frameworks, or enterprise product management is valued depending on the domain.

roles.title: UI/UX Designer
roles.description: UI/UX Designers create intuitive, engaging, and visually stunning digital experiences that delight users while meeting business objectives. Candidates should hold a Bachelor's degree in Design, Human-Computer Interaction, Visual Communication, or equivalent with a portfolio demonstrating strong design thinking and visual design skills. UX skills required include user research methodologies (contextual inquiry, usability testing, A/B testing, surveys, analytics analysis), information architecture, user flow diagrams, wireframing, and prototyping. Experience conducting heuristic evaluations, accessibility audits, and competitive design analysis. Proficiency in creating personas, empathy maps, customer journey maps, and service design blueprints. UI design skills include strong visual design fundamentals covering typography, color theory, layout composition, and visual hierarchy. Expertise in design tools such as Figma (auto-layout, components, design tokens, prototyping), Sketch, Adobe XD, and Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects). Experience creating and maintaining design systems including reusable component libraries, style guides, design tokens, and documentation. Knowledge of responsive design principles for web and mobile, platform-specific design guidelines (Material Design for Android, Human Interface Guidelines for iOS), and understanding of design for multiple screen sizes and input methods. Understanding of frontend technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) sufficient to communicate design intent and constraints with developers. Experience with interaction design, micro-animations, motion design principles, and tools like Principle, Lottie, or Framer Motion. Knowledge of accessibility standards (WCAG 2.1 AA), inclusive design practices, and designing for diverse abilities. Strong collaboration skills for working in cross-functional teams with product managers, developers, and researchers. Data-informed design approach using analytics and user feedback to iterate on designs.

roles.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
roles.description: Cybersecurity Analysts protect organizations from cyber threats by monitoring, detecting, analyzing, and responding to security incidents. Candidates should hold a Bachelor's degree in Cybersecurity, Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field, with industry certifications such as CompTIA Security+, CEH (Certified Ethical Hacker), CISSP, OSCP, or CISM being highly valued. Core technical skills include proficiency in network security concepts including firewalls, IDS/IPS, VPNs, network segmentation, and zero-trust architecture. Experience with Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) tools like Splunk, IBM QRadar, Microsoft Sentinel, or Elastic Security for log analysis, threat detection, and incident correlation. Knowledge of vulnerability assessment and penetration testing using tools like Nmap, Metasploit, Burp Suite, OWASP ZAP, and Nessus. Understanding of common attack vectors and techniques documented in MITRE ATT&CK framework, including phishing, SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, privilege escalation, and lateral movement. Proficiency in endpoint detection and response (EDR) tools, malware analysis fundamentals, and digital forensics methodology. Experience with identity and access management (IAM), Active Directory security, multi-factor authentication, and privileged access management. Knowledge of cloud security for AWS, Azure, or GCP including shared responsibility model, cloud security posture management, and container security. Understanding of compliance frameworks and standards including SOC 2, ISO 27001, NIST Cybersecurity Framework, PCI DSS, HIPAA, and GDPR. Scripting and automation skills in Python, PowerShell, or Bash for automating security tasks and building custom detection rules. Strong analytical and communication skills for incident reporting, security awareness training, and communicating risks to stakeholders.
